summary: Manual spec review approved GH-169 Codex-like desktop shell spike at head 51b2ce88399c12b693fc77c38ec5915a708e21d2. The spec is scoped to WebEnvoy-native shell primitives, fixture-only renderer state, Codex restored-source references, and packaged screenshot evidence for product direction confirmation. It does not approve GH-170 migration, GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live Core/Harbor/Lode behavior, or real function/data contracts. Post-review drift in this commit is limited to GH-169 evidence/progress/review carriers.
reviewed_validation_summary: PR #174 head 51b2ce88399c12b693fc77c38ec5915a708e21d2 passed local `npm run build`, `WEBENVOY_PACKAGED_SMOKE_SCREENSHOT=artifacts/gh-169-codex-like-shell.png npm run smoke:packaged`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-169 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-169 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-169 --json`. Hosted run 28675908540 passed py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli, and loom-check; loom-pr-merge-gate failed because current-head review artifacts were missing before this carrier update.
follow_ups: After GH-169 merge/closeout, start GH-170 only from the confirmed shell foundation and migrate Task Thread content without live Core/Harbor/Lode integration.
Run GH-171 fidelity QA after GH-170; do not close parent #167 until GH-170 and GH-171 have their own evidence and closeout.
Future functional integration must still go through UI design, review, and walkthrough; GH-169 fixtures do not define real function or data contracts.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-169 spec, plan, implementation contract, task carrier, build evidence, evidence map, screenshots, and PR metadata all describe the same bounded direction-confirmation spike. The spec explicitly excludes business content migration, final QA, Stage 5, and live owner-runtime contracts.
